narrative.headline: What 2016 Ford Focus owners report most
narrative.summary: Power train issues dominate owner complaints for this model, with reports of lurching, abnormal RPM spikes, and loss of drive. Engine and fuel/propulsion complaints describe overheating, stalling, jerking, and sputtering — sometimes requiring engine replacement. Electrical system reports are less common but include similar lurching and RPM anomalies.

issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle lunging unexpectedly and the engine RPM climbing abnormally high during operation. · 8 crash · 3 injured

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report the engine overheating, with some cases resulting in dealers recommending full engine replacement. · 1 fire · 7 crash · 5 injured
